candidate_findings.finding: The canonical test command is not confirmed until the human operating-decisions interview records it.

open_questions_for_main_agent.question: Which checks are mandatory blockers and which are advisory?
open_questions_for_main_agent.rationale: Verification blocker policy affects project-bound gate semantics.

positive_evidence: The project has a candidate verification surface to bind after human confirmation.
gate_recommendations: Bind verification_gate to the confirmed pytest command before using implementation workflows.
risks: A green run is not acceptance evidence until it is produced by the project-bound verification gate.
open_questions: Which checks are mandatory blockers and which are advisory?
requires_human_decisions: Confirm mandatory verification blockers and canonical commands.
